task: Write a Python function that extracts the AWS region from an S3 bucket URL like 's3://my-bucket.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com/key'. The function should return just the region code (e.g., 'us-west-2').
Create a JSON object representing an AWS IAM policy that allows a principal to perform only GetObject and PutObject actions on a specific S3 bucket named 'data-bucket'.
Write a regular expression that validates AWS access key IDs. AWS access keys start with 'AKIA' followed by 16 alphanumeric characters.
